nasb.text: Behold, I, even I am bringing the flood of water upon the earth, to destroy all flesh in which is the breath of life, from under heaven; everything that is on the earth shall perish.

esv.text: For behold, I will bring a flood of waters upon the earth to destroy all flesh in which is the breath of life under heaven. Everything that is on the earth shall die.

cnv.text: 看哪，我要使洪水臨到地上，消滅天下的生物，就是有生氣的活物；在地上的都必定要死。

ccb.text: 看啊，我要使洪水在地上泛滥，毁灭天下。地上一切有气息的生灵都要灭亡。

csbs.text: “看哪，我要使大洪水临到地上，要从普天下毁灭一切有生命气息、有血肉的，地上的一切都将断气！
